prompt: A timeline of money leaving my account soon: upcoming scheduled payments and subscription renewals, ordered by date with the total going out.
wire:
export default function OutflowTimeline() { const [scheduled, setScheduled] = useState([]); const [recurring, setRecurring] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); useEffect(() => { Promise.all([ tools.host_listScheduledPayments({}), tools.host_getRecurringInsights({}) ]).then(([sched, rec]) => { setScheduled(sched.data || sched.payments || sched || []); setRecurring(rec.subscriptions || rec.recurring || rec.data || []); setLoading(false); }); }, []); if (loading) { return (
Loading upcoming payments…
); } const today = new Date("2026-07-21"); const schedItems = (Array.isArray(scheduled) ? scheduled : []).map((p) => ({ id: "sched-" + (p.id || p.payeeId || Math.random()), label: p.payeeName || p.name || p.descriptor || "Payment", amountCents: p.amountCents || p.amount || 0, date: p.nextDate || p.scheduledDate || p.date || null, type: "scheduled", note: p.memo || p.note || null, })); const recItems = (Array.isArray(recurring) ? recurring : []).map((r) => ({ id: "rec-" + (r.id || r.merchant || Math.random()), label: r.merchant || r.name || r.descriptor || "Subscription", amountCents: r.amountCents || r.amount || 0, date: r.nextDate || r.nextBillingDate || r.renewalDate || null, type: "subscription", note: r.frequency || r.interval || null, })); const all = [...schedItems, ...recItems] .filter((item) => item.date) .sort((a, b) => new Date(a.date) - new Date(b.date)); const totalCents = all.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (item.amountCents || 0), 0); const fmt_money = (cents) => { if (!cents && cents !== 0) return "—"; return new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", { style: "currency", currency: "USD" }).format(cents / 100); }; const fmt_date = (iso) => { if (!iso) return "—"; const d = new Date(iso); if (isNaN(d)) return "—"; const diff = Math.round((d - today) / 86400000); const label = diff === 0 ? "Today" : diff === 1 ? "Tomorrow" : diff < 0 ? `${Math.abs(diff)}d ago` : `In ${diff}d`; return { full: d.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric", year: d.getFullYear() !== today.getFullYear() ? "numeric" : undefined }), relative: label, diff, }; }; const typeColor = { scheduled: "#111111", subscription: "#908C85" }; const typeLabel = { scheduled: "Scheduled", subscription: "Subscription" }; return (
{/* Hero total */}
Total going out
{fmt_money(totalCents)}
Scheduled payments
{fmt_money(schedItems.reduce((s, i) => s + i.amountCents, 0))}
Subscriptions
{fmt_money(recItems.reduce((s, i) => s + i.amountCents, 0))}
Items
{all.length}
{/* Timeline */} {all.length === 0 ? (
Nothing scheduled — you're all clear.
) : (
{all.map((item, idx) => { const d = fmt_date(item.date); const isLast = idx === all.length - 1; const isSoon = d.diff >= 0 && d.diff <= 3; return (
{/* Date column */}
{d.full}
{d.relative}
{/* Label + type */}
{item.label}
{typeLabel[item.type]} {item.note && ( {item.note} )}
{/* Amount */}
{fmt_money(item.amountCents)}
); })}
)}
); }
